name: election-insight-canada
description: A data-driven web application for exploring Canadian federal election results and estimating seat outcomes from polling data.

scripts.backend:start: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.backend:typecheck: cd backend && uv run mypy app common loaders scripts
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && uv run coverage run -m pytest -v && uv run coverage report

author: Tom-js-python <tomrembrown@proton.me>
